intro: Mangaluru is the gateway to the Tulu Nadu coast, combining a major port, banking industry, and education hub. Radhe packers and movers's 240+ verified vendors cover all localities, from dense Bunder port areas to residential hills of Kadri and Bejai.
whyUs: Mangaluru's hilly coastal terrain requires experienced drivers. Our vendors are trained on the city's gradient roads and coastal salt-air packing requirements.

faqs.q: Do you cover Surathkal and Mukka?
faqs.a: Yes — NITK Surathkal, Mukka, Deralakatte and all suburban areas are covered.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Mangaluru?
Do you handle coastal humidity-sensitive packing?
faqs.a: Yes, our vendors use humidity-resistant packing materials suitable for coastal conditions.
